mapper.select: SELECT * FROM note WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY update_time DESC
SELECT DISTINCT n.* FROM note n LEFT JOIN note_collaborator nc ON n.id = nc.note_id WHERE n.is_deleted = 0 AND (n.user_id = #{userId} OR nc.user_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY n.update_time DESC
SELECT * FROM note WHERE folder_id = #{folderId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY update_time DESC

SELECT * FROM note WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY update_time DESC

SELECT DISTINCT n.* FROM note n LEFT JOIN note_collaborator nc ON n.id = nc.note_id WHERE n.is_deleted = 0 AND (n.user_id = #{userId} OR nc.user_id = #{userId}) AND (n.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR n.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR n.tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY update_time DESC
SELECT * FROM note WHERE is_public = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY update_time DESC

SELECT DISTINCT n.* FROM note n LEFT JOIN note_collaborator nc ON n.id = nc.note_id WHERE n.is_deleted = 0 AND (n.user_id = #{userId} OR nc.user_id = #{userId}) AND n.update_time >= #{startTime} ORDER BY n.update_time DESC
SELECT DISTINCT n.* FROM note n JOIN note_tag t ON n.id = t.note_id WHERE n.user_id = #{userId} AND n.is_deleted = 0 AND t.tag_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tagName}, '%') ORDER BY n.update_time DESC

SELECT DISTINCT n.* FROM note n LEFT JOIN note_collaborator nc ON n.id = nc.note_id JOIN note_tag t ON n.id = t.note_id WHERE n.is_deleted = 0 AND (n.user_id = #{userId} OR nc.user_id = #{userId}) AND t.tag_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tagName}, '%') ORDER BY n.update_time DESC
SELECT MAX(n.update_time) FROM note n LEFT JOIN note_collaborator nc ON n.id = nc.note_id WHERE n.is_deleted = 0 AND (n.user_id = #{userId} OR nc.user_id = #{userId})
SELECT * FROM note WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 1 ORDER BY deleted_time DESC, update_time DESC
SELECT * FROM note WHERE is_deleted = 1 AND deleted_time IS NOT NULL AND deleted_time <= #{cutoff} ORDER BY deleted_time ASC
